providers: only if the conversation involves network coverage for specific doctors and facilities like hospitals. It shouldn't be tagged as provider just because the word doctor appears.
enrollment: about the enrollment process, deadline, and confirmation including card services.
plan costs: about general costs associated with the plan and not any specific drug or procedure or hospital or surgery or dental cost.
prescription drug coverage: about drug costs, include over-the-counter or otc, associated with the plan. exclude specific drug coverage termination or discontinuation. examples that should be included are: 'What are the over the counter credits available in my plan?', 'Is there a home delivery service for medications?', 'What is the medication Codel 5 milligram tablet?', 'Why was I charged for the hydrocortisone tablets?', 'What is the cost of a three-month supply of Xarelto?'. examples that should be excluded are: 'What is the prescription drug coverage under this plan?', 'why is byetta not covered any more?'
dental: about dental costs and coverage associated with the plan including dental procedures.
plan changes: about switching plans including the process, deadline, coverage in the new plan. it should exclude entire plan and specific drug coverage termination.also exclude if it is plan renewal related.
eligibility: about general eligibility inquiry for Medicare, dual plans, special needs plans.
vision: about vision coverage including glasses, eyewear, costs, and procedures related to vision.
transportation, food and gym benefits: about transportation, food, and gym benefits covered in the plan.
digital friction: about confusion or difficulty finding information online on the website.
plan comparison: about plan differences only including comparing costs between plans for various benefits like dental, doctors, and drugs.
service area reduction: only when it is mentioned that the existing plan is not available anymore.only the entire plan discontinuation should be included and not a specific benefit, like dental, or drug coverage termination. Examples that should be included are: 'plan that i enrolled in current year is not available in my zipcode anymore', 'plan that i enrolled in 2025 is not available in 2026', 'plan than you currently enrolled in is not available next year'. Examples that should be excluded are: 'Why did the dental coverage discontinue?', 'Why is lipitor not covered anymore?'
member renewal: about plan renewal only and not specific benefits related renewal. should not include fitness program called 'Renew Active'. should not include other membership renewal like gym.
drug coverage termination: only when a specific drug is terminated or discontinued. some drugs include noxafil,humulin,aspart,byetta,perseris. do not include general changes to overall drug coverage benefit at the plan level. exclude devices like glucose meters. examples to include are: 'why is noxafil not covered anymore', 'i was on humulin for my diabetes and why is that no more covered'. examples to exclude are: 'What can be done if a medication is not covered?', 'Have there been any changes to my medications?', 'Will my prescription drug plan continue next year?', 'Starting August, Lifescan One Touch blood glucose meters and test strips will no longer be covered'.
medicare id: questions about locating, verifying, and using Medicare ID number like the medicare beneficiary number or mbi. should not include the enrollment related insurance ID card related questions. examples that should be included are: 'I dont know my mbi', 'How do i find out my medicare id?', 'What is mbi?', 'I dont have my medicare number.', 'Where do I find my Medicare member ID number?'
others: questions about anything other than the above topics.
